data.description: The Australian government has criticized the US government's decision to increase tariffs on Australian exports, describing the move as "completely unjustified" and emphasizing that Canberra has strict standards in combating forced labor and modern slavery.

data.title: Infinity Natural Resources Announces Second Quarter 2026 Results Earnings Release and Conference Call Dates
data.description: MORGANTOWN, West Virginia--Infinity Natural Resources, Inc. (NYSE: INR) revealed plans to disclose its financial and operational performance for the second quarter of 2026 on August 10, 2026, post-market closure. Following this, a conference call will be held on August 11, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time by the management to analyze the outcomes. To join the conference call, interested individuals can sign up at https://events.q4inc.com/attendee/627523741 or call +1 585 542 9983 (U.S. Local).

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise As Oil Prices Retreat; Intel Rises After Google, Tesla Dive
data.description: Following significant gains, oil prices dropped which led to an increase in futures. Intel saw a rise in its stock value due to positive earnings, while Google and Tesla experienced a decline. The Dow Jones futures have risen as a result of these movements, with oil prices retreating and Intel's stock going up after Google and Tesla's stocks decreased.

data.title: Tokenized RWAs now account for over 50% of Hyperliquid's weekly trading volume, becoming its top trading category.
data.description: The trading of Real World Asset (RWA) tokens on Hyperliquid experienced a significant surge, now constituting over 50% of the decentralized exchange's total weekly trading volume.

data.title: HPE Names David Goulden to Board of Directors
data.description: Houston-based technology company HPE (NYSE: HPE) disclosed the addition of David Goulden to its Board of Directors on Saturday. Starting immediately, Goulden will contribute his expertise to the Board's Finance & Investment Committee as well as the HR & Compensation Committee. With over 35 years in the industry, Goulden holds substantial management and financial leadership experience in various global technology firms. His most recent role was as the Executive Vice President and CFO at Booking Holdings Inc.

data.title: BiomX Subsidiary Zorronet Expands European Presence Through Two Strategic Collaborations in Europe
data.description: A new partnership has been announced to enhance Zorronet's AI-driven tools for detection, analysis, and response in agricultural security, theft prevention, and safeguarding critical transportation infrastructure. This collaboration is set to significantly broaden the scope of Zorronet's capabilities in these areas.

data.title: UMD Smith School Researchers Warn AI Security Lapses Highlight Urgent Need for Independent Oversight
data.description: In College Park, Maryland on July 24, 2026, researchers from the University of Maryland's Robert H. Smith School of Business highlighted a concerning trend in AI security following the OpenAI-Hugging Face breach. This series of recent lapses has prompted the researchers to question whether tech companies are equipped to effectively govern the rapidly evolving landscape of artificial intelligence. The breach serves as a stark reminder of the challenges posed by ensuring the safety and security of AI systems.
